chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1512 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.04.2025. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Kuber, AAG. *********** None present for petitioner, nor any intimation received. Same was position on the last date of hearing i.e 15.05.2024 which reflects that petitioner and his counsel have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
